app.title: Adventure
app.hero.subtitle: A D&D 5e tabletop in thy browser. Bring thy mates, go it alone like a proper hermit, or simply spectate whilst judging everyone's decisions. As is tradition.
auth.signInPrompt: State thy identity, if you would be so kind.
auth.discord: Enter via Discord, like a commoner
auth.google: Enter via Google, how terribly modern
auth.github: Enter via GitHub, ah a person of culture
auth.cancel: I have changed my mind, good day
auth.signInToCreate: One must announce oneself before founding an expedition
auth.signInToCreateChar: One must announce oneself before commissioning a character
auth.signInToImport: One must announce oneself before importing a character
auth.signInToManage: Announce thyself to manage thy expeditions, there's a good chap.
auth.signInToManageChars: Announce thyself to manage thy entourage, there's a good chap.
auth.signInToRestore: One must announce oneself before rummaging through the archives
nav.roomCode: Room code or carrier pigeon reference number
feature.neverPlayed.label: Never played? Splendid.
feature.neverPlayed.desc: The game shall instruct thee as thou stumblest forward. Create a character, hurl dice at the table, wallop a monster. No tome of rules required.
feature.realDice.label: Proper Dice, Proper Drama
feature.realDice.desc: Critical strikes gleam with the fury of a thousand suns. Fumbles shake the very foundations. Every roll is frightfully important.
feature.bringEveryone.label: Bring the Whole Village
feature.bringEveryone.desc: Solo, duo, the entire parish. Human, mechanical brain, or no mechanical brain whatsoever. Requires only a browser and a stiff upper lip.
feature.combat.label: Have at Them, Lads
feature.combat.desc: Lob fireballs, outflank the blighters, rescue thy companions from certain doom. Combat that feels like a proper scrap down the pub.
feature.maps.label: Explore Actual Cartography
feature.maps.desc: Reveal the fog of war, sidestep traps like a gentleman, discover treasure. Move thy token and see what catastrophe unfolds.
feature.quickStart.label: Playing in Under a Minute
feature.quickStart.desc: No downloads. No accounts. No 400-page manuscript gathering dust. Click a campaign and Bob's your uncle.
howItWorks.title: How One Proceeds
howItWorks.step1.desc: Found an expedition with a single click, or present a room code to join thy companions. No paperwork required - enter as a peasant immediately.
howItWorks.step2.desc: Commission characters with the full complement of D&D 5e statistics, or import from D&D Beyond. Assign seats to humans or mechanical servants - any arrangement shall suffice.
howItWorks.step3.desc: Explore, engage in fisticuffs, and perform dramatic soliloquies with live dice, fog of war, and real-time synchronisation. It all runs in thy browser, which is rather clever.
quickStart.title: Pre-Arranged Expeditions
char.rollStats: One must roll one's statistics before exporting, surely you knew that.
char.needName: Thy character requires a name. Even peasants have names.
combat.rerollInit: Actually, Let Us Try That Again
dice.secretMode: Hush Mode - the DM is being sneaky
